creator: lacey.leanne@gmail.com
text:
Spent some quality time with Poudriere and Synth, and found out that:

CPUTYPE?=native

was the issue compiling both versions of R from the head of ports and from the 2017Q2 branch.

Interesting that causes no problems when I just do:

cd /usr/ports/math/R && make install

But your suggestions were enough to answer my questions.

Apologies for the trouble, and thank you for your prompt responses and pointing me in the right direction.
